name: APEX
description: Autonomous code coverage analysis and security detection. Analyzes 11 languages for coverage gaps, security vulnerabilities (CWE-mapped), reverse path reachability, and deployment readiness.

skills.name: Coverage Analysis
skills.description: Identify uncovered code branches and generate gap reports

skills.name: Security Detection
skills.description: Find security vulnerabilities with CWE IDs and SARIF output

skills.name: Reverse Path Analysis
skills.description: Trace from any code location back to entry points

skills.name: CI Coverage Gate
skills.description: Enforce minimum coverage thresholds in CI/CD

skills.name: Deployment Scoring
skills.description: Calculate deployment confidence based on coverage and security
